a.xlink:title: Defines the contract for all items that can exist within the game world.
Represents a coin item that increases the player's currency when picked up.
Represents a gold item that increases the player's gold currency when picked up.
Represents an item that can be equipped by the player.
Represents a Thorn on that map, and walking over it causes damange.
Represents an abstract base class for all equippable weapons.
Represents a powerful two-handed sword weapon.
Represents a standard one-handed sword weapon.
